twitch_info.title: Feel free to say hi :) Playing some avoidance │ Stream #4

message.body: Hello
how many hours do you have on "K3"?
Gl on the Stream
Have recently started playing the EZ version of K3 as one of my first fangame and it’s so insane how much harder these games are than they look. Just got past rz today with like 9000 deaths total.
yeah the easy version basically removes/nerfs the chokepoints in the needle (mostly corners lmao) and heavily nerfs the bosses.
Have only beaten I wanna run the marathon before so with that like 20 hours lol
Like the end drop in rz save 3 and like most of the corner jumps.
But I’ve seen a lot of K3 speedruns so I know that it’s way easier.
yeah save 4 doesn’t have the corner at the end and the bottom spike of the last jump is removed so thats a lot easier in ez.
yeah vines are also something that I can’t get used to. Especially when they are not full jumps.
I feel like if I started regular K3 I would still be stuck at the first boss right now. The bosses have like less than half the bullets in ez
yeah that one only spawed 3 apples per burst and I still died to it once.
yeah there are like 6 bosses or so but all of them except for the last one are easy.
The last one took me like 2 hours, so it’s also not bad but probably the only reason the game is rated 50 difficulty.
yeah I want to try K3 maybe after I beat ez. ez is rated like 70 difficulty so that would be a nice step up.
Don’t want to spend like 1000 hours on my second fangame
yeah K2 sounds good after K3 ez
Nice
Now the annoing save
yeah when I got into guy tower in ez I also died to the first evil save. I was so scared there was no autosave.
In the speedruns they make it look so easy to spam fast enough
I think doing benzen by dying to it more than 20 times after 1 and a half minutes of boss it would take forever.
People I think just hold left and time the jump inputs
Nice progress. The days where nothing happens are always so demotivating to me.
yeah that was also heavily nerfed in ez and I was very happy about that.
yeah the last jump only had one spike on the bottom and the top so it basically turned into a gate (?)
like the spikes were still sideways so it was slightly harder than a gate
yeah just the second set of spikes of that jump was removed nothing else was changed
nah I meant nothing about that jump. The rest of the save was probably nerfed a lot as well.
The second save of guy tower. Beat save 4 of rz today.
The one before the one I saw you beat.
got to the vine there and died to the falling spike trap and then called it for today
Speedrunners do like 2 fast inputs, pause, 4 fast inputs with the last one a full jump and then the vine.
like short pause
nah I mean pausing the jump inputs
like tap tap wait short tap tap tap tap.
yeah this save can kill speedruns as well. It’s so precise it’s basically luck if you get it
Are you playing on 2.02?
The last save of this area doesn’t have the corner at the end anymore irc
or at least it’s nerfed
It’s just extra m stage but it looks like guy tower lmao
It’s funny that if you move while it’s red you get fully booted out of the extra stages and have to do the first one again.
yeah some of the crystals are just ridiculous
yeah doing all of this deathless especially with this save at the end is insane
